name: HAWKEYE
description: Despite his lack of superpowers, Hawkeye's unparalleled skills as a marksman have earned him a spot alongside earth's mightiest heroes. With a cool head and steady hand, Clint Barton never misses a target… so enemies best stay out of his sights!
lore: Clint Barton is one of the greatest marksmen alive. He may not have superpowers, but his natural ability to hit virtually any target earned him a place alongside Earth’s mightiest heroes. As Hawkeye, he's been known to take down an entire enemy fleet with nothing more than a quiver full of arrows. For a time, Clint distanced himself from the Avengers, setting off on a quest for vengeance as the assassin called Ronin. He returned to the fold older and wiser, just in time to infiltrate Hydra’s Erebus Base and rescue the captured Winter Soldier.

stats.Casting: Charged projectile with an arced trajectory
stats.Projectile Speed: 130 - 195 m/s (Maximum speed is achieved after 0.9s of charging)
stats.Damage: 28 - 70 (Maximum damage is achieved after 0.9s of charging)

stats.Casting: Arced projectile that generates a spell field upon impact

abilities.name: Hunter's Sight
abilities.description: Capture Afterimages of enemies in his view. Damage dealt to an Afterimage is transferred to the corresponding enemy

stats.Special Mechanic: While Hunter's Sight is active, bow draw speed is increased

abilities.name: Crescent Slash
abilities.description: Unsheathe a katana and slash forward, launching up enemies hit

abilities.name: Hypersonic Arrow
abilities.description: Shoot a Hypersonic Arrow, dealing two instances of damage to enemies in its path and inflicting them with Slow. This ability can Knock Down flying heroes

stats.Casting: Straight-line projectile that is accompanied by a spell field

abilities.name: Ronin Slash
abilities.description: Swing a wakizashi to strike frontal enemies, deflecting all incoming projectiles

stats.Special Effect: This ability cannot block explosions or effects created by projectiles on hit

abilities.name: Skyward Leap
abilities.description: Perform a double jump in the direction of movement

abilities.name: Archer's Focus
abilities.description: Aim at an enemy to improve focus, enhancing the damage inflicted by Piercing Arrow

stats.Bonus Damage: 0 - 90 (Maximum damage is achieved after 0.9s of aiming)
stats.Special Mechanic: Apply bonus damage to the base damage of Piercing Arrow

received.name: MOONLIT SLASH
received.description: Cloak & Dagger inject light and dark energy into Hawkeye's katana. When Hawkeye uses Crescent Slash, enemies hit are launched back, and a blade wave filled with light and energy sweeps forward. This wave passes through both allies and enemies: it heals and boosts healing for allies, while damaging enemies and applying Vulnerability

base.description: Upgrade Blast Arrow to Psionic Arrow. While drawn, Hawkeye can continuously bank extra Psionic Arrows. Releasing the bowstring rapidly fires all accumulated arrows forward in sequence.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Psylocke, the nocking speed for each Psionic Arrow is significantly quickened, and they explode upon hitting enemies or the environment.

base.description: Upgrade Crescent Slash to Moonlit Slash, projecting a radiant slash outward. It heals and boosts healing for allies, while damaging enemies and applying Vulnerability.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Cloak & Dagger, Moonlit Slash can be chained into a three-hit combo, firing off three consecutive sweeping light blades.
